use_cases: Confirmation dialogs for user actions like deletions or sign-outs
Form submissions displayed in centered modal containers
Alert or notification overlays with dismiss functionality
Content previews in modal format over page content
Privacy policy or terms display in modal overlays
ai_summary: A minimalist modal dialog component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Features smooth fade and zoom animations for open/close states, a semi-transparent dark overlay backdrop, and a dismissible close button. Designed for desktop and mobile use, suitable for confirmation dialogs, form modals, and content overlays in SaaS and e-commerce applications.
